title: Quickstart
subtitle: From zero to first contract workflow in minutes.
prerequisites: A project folder where contracts will live
Package manager available (pnpm, npm, yarn or bun)

install.title: Install
install.description: Add the CLI so your project can create and manage contract-driven artifacts.
results: The `contract-kit` command is available in your project
You can run init, generate and check commands

initialize.title: Initialize
initialize.description: Scaffold the baseline files and folders for a contract-first workflow.
results: You have a ready starting point for your first contract

generate.title: Generate
generate.description: Convert contract definitions into typed artifacts for frontend and backend integration.
results: Generated files are written under your output folder
Types stay aligned with your contract source
Teams can consume the same canonical API model

compatibility.title: Compatibility check
compatibility.description: Run contract diff validation to catch breaking API changes before release.
results: You can block unsafe releases in CI
Versioning decisions are based on real contract impact

nextDescription: Go to Docs for schema examples and command reference, then connect your first endpoint end-to-end.
